title: Student Roster Lookup
prompt_md:
## Goal
Store a fixed roster of students in a `constexpr std::array` of structs, then look one up by index. Each student has a name and a grade.

The roster (in order, index 0 to 3) is:
```
Alice 92
Bob   85
Carol 97
Dave  78
```

## Input
A single integer: the 0-based index to look up.

## Output
- If the index is 0..3, print `<name> has grade <grade>`.
- Otherwise print `Invalid index`.

## Example
Input `0` produces `Alice has grade 92`.

title: Rectangle Area Report
prompt_md:
## Goal
Store a fixed collection of named rectangles in a `constexpr std::array` of structs, then print each rectangle whose area (width * height) is greater than or equal to a given threshold, in array order.

The rectangles (in order) are:
```
A 3 4
B 10 2
C 1 1
D 5 5
E 2 3
```

## Input
A single integer: the minimum area threshold.

## Output
- For each qualifying rectangle (area >= threshold), print `<name>: <area>` on its own line, in array order.
- If none qualify, print `None`.

## Example
Input `10` produces:
```
A: 12
B: 20
D: 25
```

test_cases.label: Sample -- threshold 10 shows A, B, D
Hidden -- threshold 13 shows B and D
